data.Subject: UPDATED: CAPACITY REDUCTION:  GTN – Station 9 CFTP (Updated: 6/21/26)
data.Text:
Since the last posting, GTN has extended the A Iine Ione to Bend ILI maintenance through 6/26 (previously 6/22) and updated the capacity impact at Station 9 CFTP (LOC #18480). As a result, capacity will be reduced as follows:
 
6/19 – 6/26 - Available Capacity 1,650 MMcf/d
 
Please refer to the EBB for any additional capacity impacts.
 
GTN anticipates this posting may result in Firm Primary, Firm Secondary and Interruptible curtailments. The Reservation Charge Crediting Mechanism of Section 5.1.3.10 shall apply to this outage.
 
Please direct any questions to your Account Coordinator, Customer Service Representative, or the Nominations and Scheduling hotline @ 888-750-6275.

data.Subject: JULY 2026 - GTN Fuel and Line Loss Percentage
data.Text:
Pursuant to Gas Transmission Northwest's (GTN) Tariffed Fuel Adjustments Provision, for the period of July 01, 2026 through July 31, 2026, a fuel usage rate of 0.0034% per Dth/mile will be in effect.  This percentage is inclusive of GTN's current fuel and line loss surcharge of 0.00000% per Dth per pipeline mile, which is in effect through December 31, 2026, in accordance with GTN's approved tariff provision, "Adjustment Mechanism for Fuel, Line Loss, and Other Unaccounted for Gas."

 

This posting is accompanied by the following attachments:


	GTN System Fuel Rates
	GTN Fuel and Line Loss Surcharge
	Historical GTN Fuel Rates (2012 to Present)


 

If you have any questions, please contact Commercial Services at 888.750.6275

data.Subject: UPDATED: CAPACITY REDUCTION: GTN – Rosalia Compressor Station (Updated: 6/16/26)
data.Text:
Since the last posting, GTN has extended the unplanned maintenance at Rosalia Compressor Station for Units A & B. As a result, capacity will be reduced as follows:

6/12 – 7/2 (previously 6/21) Station 6 CFTP (LOC #954690) – Available Capacity 2,500 MMcf/d.

Please refer to the EBB for any additional capacity impacts.

GTN anticipates this posting may result in Firm Primary, Firm Secondary and Interruptible curtailments. The Reservation Charge Crediting Mechanism of Section 5.1.3.10 shall apply to this outage.

Please direct any questions to your Account Coordinator, Customer Service Representative, or the Nominations and Scheduling hotline @ 888-750-6275.

data.Subject: Open Season Posting July26 King-Malin & June26 Turquoise Flats-Kingsgate MC
data.Text:
GTN is posting an Open Season for July 2026 Kingsgate to Malin and July 2026 Turquoise Flats to Kingsgate MC

This Open Season Closes at 10:00 AM CT on Monday June 15, 2026

Questions can be directed to:

Sean McDonald 832-320-5332

Dan Junek 832-320-5825

Kirsten Kahanek 832-320-6746

Attachments.FileName: GTN Open Season July 2026 K-M and July 2026 Turquoise Flats to Kingsgate.docx

data.Subject: MAINTENANCE SCHEDULE for Gas Transmission Northwest (Posted: 6/2/26)
data.Text:
Gas Transmission Northwest Maintenance Schedule has been updated.  

 

Please refer to the maintenance schedule for the projected capacity impacts.  Updated items are as follows:  

 

• Added: 6/2 – 6/16 – Unplanned Rosalia Compressor Station Maintenance

• Moved: 7/17 – 8/1 – Rosalia Launcher Installation

• Updated: 7/17 – 8/1 – Chemult Launcher Installation

• Updated: 8/3 – 8/20 – Starbuck Outage and Bypass Installation

• Updated: 8/3 – 8/20 – Bonanza Bypass and Receiver Installation

 

Please note that the information posted is proposed and subject to change.  

 

Please direct any questions to your Account Coordinator, Customer Service Representative, or the Nominations and Scheduling hotline @ 888-750-6275
